name: GaugeFlow substrate-v2 decoration-only qualification v3
objective: Qualify a geometry-aware categorical site-decoration substrate before any tensor-conditioned flow experiment. This remains a fixed-geometry endpoint-ID control, not a rerun, amendment, or replacement of A5--A11.

supersedes.reason: v2 passed chemical assignment and structure metrics for the vector-invariant scorer but failed the unchanged complete-assignment probability-vector relabeling threshold. The failure was amplified by unbounded exact-law scores after NLL saturation. v3 retains the panel, seeds, architecture widths, optimizer, 1,200 updates, samples and thresholds; it adds a fixed score bound and float64 neighbour aggregation so arbitrary FP32 input ordering cannot become a chemical signal.

historical_evidence_is_immutable.instruction: Gate A through A11.0 reports, thresholds, checkpoints, data split, and conclusions remain frozen. A11-Q1 remains unstarted and is not changed by this protocol.
historical_evidence_is_immutable.v1: The completed v1 artifact is retained but invalid for promotion because its node-relabeling audit did not run a relabelled model input.
historical_evidence_is_immutable.v2: The completed v2 artifact is retained as a valid failed numerical-equivariance qualification; no metric or threshold was changed after observing it.

scope.state: fixed true periodic fractional geometry and row-vector lattice; all atom species are absorbing-mask tokens
scope.vocabulary: dense chemical tokens 0..117 for atomic numbers 1..118; internal mask token 118; no untrained chemical class 0
scope.not_a_production_claim: Supplying counts is allowed only for this isolated scorer qualification and does not establish unconditional composition generation.

architectures.purpose: Normalized local direction messages without metric radial features or vector-state invariants.
Adds periodic closest-image distance/RBF features to every scalar message.
Adds equivariant vector channels and their scalar dot-product/norm invariants as well as RBF metric geometry.
Applied identically to every scorer: exact count-constrained likelihood under the proper-SO(3) residual automorphism group.

assignment.training_law: For site--species scores C[i,k] and supplied qualification counts n, enumerate each unique Y in A(n), set S(Y)=sum_i C[i,Y_i], and normalize exp(S(Y)) exactly. Target likelihood sums only UniqueOrbit_{Gamma_t}(Y). Exact energies use float64 accumulation while gradients connect to float32 model scores.
assignment.score_parameterization: Every chemical score is B*tanh(raw/B), with pre-registered B=20.0. This is a bounded categorical energy, not a target-specific vocabulary or a changed likelihood. The bound prevents NLL saturation from amplifying harmless FP32 graph-reduction order into a false chemical assignment discrepancy.
assignment.sampling: assignment-level categorical or Gumbel-max on the complete exact support; repeated species slots are never duplicated.
assignment.automorphism_scope: proper-SO(3) in the production qualification; full-O(3) is diagnostic only; residual groups are recomputed from the current mask/reveal state.
assignment.node_relabeling_audit: Run a separate model forward pass on the fixed pre-registered site permutation [2,0,3,1]. Report both maximum scorer-logit error and complete exact-assignment log-probability-vector error after transforming assignment labelings.

data_and_repetitions.panel: InN/BN, JVASP-1180/JVASP-22673, from the attested local-pinned TensorOrbit-JARVIS-v2 raw build

optimization_budget.neighbour_aggregation_accumulation: float64 then cast to model dtype

data_and_repetitions.common_noise: fixed assignment-level Gumbels are reused for counterfactual endpoint-ID samples

required_diagnostics: fixed-CIF site accuracy, reported only as a diagnostic
assignment entropy and probability of every equivalent labeling
residual automorphism group size along mask reveal states
periodic edge displacement, closest-image shift, and distance sanity checks
maximum scorer-logit and complete assignment-probability-vector error from a fresh relabelled model forward
promotion_rule: Only if the exact-quotient geometry-aware scorer meets every primary threshold on every pre-registered seed may a new, separately versioned composition-generator qualification be proposed. Tensor conditioning is still not restored by this protocol.
